label: ICE Detention Population
deltaNote: vs. ~37,000 at start of Trump second term; record high

label: ICE Annual Deportation Target (FY2026)
contestNote: ICE FY2025 total was 442,637 — target represents 2.3x current rate; 70.8% of detainees have no criminal conviction

label: Section 232 Steel Tariff (effective Apr 6)
deltaNote: Restructured to apply 50% flat rate on full customs value of steel, aluminum, and copper

label: Pharma Tariff (patented imports)
contestNote: Pharma industry disputes implementation timeline and potential for price shocks

label: DOGE Claimed Savings
contestNote: Competing analysis estimates $135B in disruption costs; DOGE cuts hampered US Iran-war readiness per CNN (Apr 2026)

label: S&P 500 (All-Time High Apr 15)
deltaNote: First-ever close above 7,000; Nasdaq notched 12-day win streak despite active Iran war blockade

label: WTI Crude Oil Price
deltaNote: WTI rising toward $93–95/bbl Apr 21 as ceasefire expired with no deal; S&P 500 moved into the red on ceasefire deadline; markets pricing in resumed US strikes

label: UMich Consumer Sentiment (Apr 2026)
source: University of Michigan Surveys of Consumers (Apr 2026)
deltaNote: Lowest in consistently-tracked history since 1978; driven by Iran war oil prices, tariff uncertainty, and weak jobs growth of ~20K/month since Jan 2025

label: Artemis II Mission Status
deltaNote: All four crew safe — Wiseman, Glover, Koch, Hansen recovered by USS John P. Murtha off San Diego; farthest crewed spaceflight at 252,756 mi

label: Iran Ceasefire / Hormuz Status
source: NPR / Al Jazeera / CNBC / The Hill (Apr 21, 2026)
contestNote: Ceasefire expired April 21 with no deal; Islamabad Round 2 ended after ~21 hrs with Iran absent from formal talks; Trump threatens to destroy Iranian power plants/bridges; US forces described as 'raring to go'
deltaNote: Iran refused to send delegates citing US blockade; Trump called extension 'highly unlikely'; WTI crude rose toward $93–95/bbl as markets priced in resumed strikes
